const clampToViewport=(x,y)=>{const el=containerRef.current;if(!el)return{x,y};const rect=el.getBoundingClientRect();const vw=window.innerWidth;const vh=window.innerHeight;const maxX=Math.max(0,vw-rect.width);const maxY=Math.max(0,vh-rect.height);return{x:Math.min(Math.max(0,x),maxX),y:Math.min(Math.max(0,y),maxY)};};// --- drag (mouse) ---

useEffect(()=>{const mm=e=>onMouseMoveGlobal(e);const mu=()=>{endDragMouse();endResize();};const tm=e=>{if(dragging.current)onTouchMove(e);if(resizing.current)onResizeMove(e.touches[0].clientX,e.touches[0].clientY);};const tu=()=>{endDragTouch();endResize();};document.addEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.addEventListener("mouseup",mu);document.addEventListener("touchmove",tm,{passive:false});document.addEventListener("touchend",tu);return()=>{document.removeEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.removeEventListener("mouseup",mu);document.removeEventListener("touchmove",tm);document.removeEventListener("touchend",tu);};},[position,size]);const renderStars=level=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wanted-stars",children:[...Array(5)].map((_,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:i<level?"filled":"empty",children:"\u2605"},i))});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{ref:containerRef,className:"wanted-list-view enter"// slide-in on mount
